name: Chicken and Sausage
recipeIngredient: 3 medium carrots, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
4 frozen chicken breasts, halved and skinned
recipeInstructions: Use frozen chicken pieces so the chicken cooks tender but not overdone. In a small saucepan, bring carrots, onion, and water to a boil. Simmer covered for 5 minutes. Transfer to a 3-4 quart crockpot. Stir in tomato paste, wine, and seasonings; add beans. Place frozen chicken on top of bean mixture. Place sausage on top of chicken. Cover. Cook on low heat setting for 9-10 hours or high heat for 5.5 to 6 hours. Do not cook for less time. This long cooking time is necessary when starting with frozen chicken. Before serving, remove bay leaves and skim off fat.
